assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses 'no_upgrades' scope for BFCM period from Nov 20 to Dec 3, explicitly stating it blocks everything during peak traffic

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses 'no_upgrades' scope for June code freeze covering entire month with proper command structure

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response uses 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' scope with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support flag and explains this allows control plane patches while blocking disruptive upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly mention the 30-day maximum limitation for 'no upgrades' exclusions or contrast it with the up-to-EoS capability of 'no minor or node upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with correct --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for all three scenarios (no_upgrades for June/BFCM, no_minor_or_node_upgrades for permanent control)

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions limit or the 48-hour maintenance window requirement in any 32-day period

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly state that manual upgrades bypass maintenance exclusions and only auto-upgrades are affected by these settings

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or the potential security implications
